---
id: create-job-kpi-graphs-graph-id-jobs-post
title: "Submit a KPI job"
description: "Creates or reuses a KPI calculation job for the requested graph and snapshot day. When the latest source watermark, worker major.minor version, and validation-policy fingerprint match the newest validated snapshot, the service completes the request immediately by cloning that snapshot instead of running the worker. Set `force_rerun=true` to bypass reuse and require a fresh worker run."
sidebar_label: "Submit a KPI job"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/graph-kpi/wordlift-graph-kpi-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Submit a KPI job"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/kpi/graphs/{graph_id}/jobs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates or reuses a KPI calculation job for the requested graph and snapshot day. When the latest source watermark, worker major.minor version, and validation-policy fingerprint match the newest validated snapshot, the service completes the request immediately by cloning that snapshot instead of running the worker. Set `force_rerun=true` to bypass reuse and require a fresh worker run.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"graph_id","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Public WordLift graph identifier (`account.id`).","title":"Graph Id","example":"1506805"},"description":"Public WordLift graph identifier (`account.id`)."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"Job submission payload. `limit_documents` and `limit_urls` are intended for bounded smoke runs and operational debugging.","example":{"snapshot_date":"2026-03-13","stage_retries":1,"force_rerun":false,"skip_validation":false},"properties":{"snapshot_date":{"type":"string","title":"Snapshot Date","description":"Logical KPI day to calculate in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.","example":"2026-03-13"},"force_rerun":{"type":"boolean","title":"Force Rerun","description":"If `true`, ignore the 24-hour freshness rule and replace a currently active job.","default":false},"stage_retries":{"type":"integer","minimum":0,"title":"Stage Retries","description":"Number of retries allowed for each stage before the job fails.","default":1},"limit_documents":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer","minimum":1},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Limit Documents","description":"Optional source document cap for bounded testing and smoke jobs."},"limit_urls":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer","minimum":1},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Limit Urls","description":"Optional URL validation cap for bounded testing and smoke jobs."},"skip_validation":{"type":"boolean","title":"Skip Validation","description":"If `true`, skip the SHACL/rich-snippet validation stage.","default":false},"replace_validation":{"type":"boolean","title":"Replace Validation","description":"If `true`, replace previously persisted validation output for the same graph/day.","default":false}},"additionalProperties":false,"type":"object","required":["snapshot_date"],"title":"SubmitJobBody"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"202":{"description":"Job accepted or existing reusable job returned.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"job_id":{"type":"string","title":"Job Id","description":"Unique job identifier.","example":"job_20260313_5bdaac21"},"graph_id":{"type":"string","title":"Graph Id","description":"Public WordLift graph identifier.","example":"1506805"},"snapshot_date":{"type":"string","title":"Snapshot Date","description":"Logical KPI day targeted by the job.","example":"2026-03-13"},"status":{"type":"string","title":"Status","description":"Current job status.","example":"completed"},"stage":{"type":"string","title":"Stage","description":"Current or last completed job stage. Cloned snapshots use `clone`.","example":"validate"},"started_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Started At","description":"Timestamp when the job started.","example":"2026-03-13T17:40:22Z"},"finished_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Finished At","description":"Timestamp when the job finished, if complete.","example":"2026-03-13T17:50:02Z"},"heartbeat_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Heartbeat At","description":"Last heartbeat timestamp emitted by the worker.","example":"2026-03-13T17:49:55Z"},"documents_seen":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Documents Seen","description":"Number of source documents scanned so far."},"documents_transformed":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Documents Transformed","description":"Number of source documents transformed so far."},"triple_rows_written":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Triple Rows Written","description":"Number of helper/assertion rows materialized so far."},"issues_written":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Issues Written","description":"Number of validation issue rows persisted so far."},"retry_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Retry Count","description":"How many stage retries were used."},"error_code":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Error Code","description":"Machine-readable failure code, if any."},"error_message":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Error Message","description":"Human-readable failure message, if any."},"account_dataset_id":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Account Dataset Id","description":"Resolved internal dataset identifier used for Mongo access."},"website_url":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Website Url","description":"Configured website URL resolved for the graph."},"stage_timings_json":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"number"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Stage Timings Json","description":"Per-stage elapsed time in seconds."},"runtime_profile_json":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Runtime Profile Json","description":"Structured calculate-stage runtime profile including fetch/analyze/flush timings and Mongo batch latency stats."}},"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object","required":["job_id","graph_id","snapshot_date","status","stage"],"title":"JobResponse"},"example":{"job_id":"job_20260313_5bdaac21","graph_id":"1506805","snapshot_date":"2026-03-13","status":"completed","stage":"validate","started_at":"2026-03-13T17:40:22Z","finished_at":"2026-03-13T17:50:02Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-03-13T17:49:55Z","documents_seen":58730,"documents_transformed":58730,"triple_rows_written":49499,"issues_written":11534,"retry_count":0,"account_dataset_id":"677fe88046061868443428fa","website_url":"https://www.busesforsale.com","stage_timings_json":{"calculate":55.11,"validate":67.66}}}}},"400":{"description":"The >
